title: St. Antony's Church, Kuninji
tagline: St. Antony's Church, Kuninji — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Antony's Church, Kuninji is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Antony's Church is a parish church of the Syro-Malabar Church in the village of Kuninji in Idukki district of Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kuninji
topPlaces.description: Kuninji is a village in the Idukki district of Kerala, India. It is located close to Thodupuzha in central Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Purapuzha
topPlaces.description: Purapuzha is a village in Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala. Purapuzha could be reached by bus from Thodupuzha within 25 minutes.

topPlaces.name: Karimkunnam, Idukki
topPlaces.description: Karimkunnam is a village in Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Manathoor
topPlaces.description: Manathoor is a small village in Kottayam district, aside Pala - Thodupuzha Highway, 12 km from Palai town and 15 km from Thodupuzha town. It lies aside of Main Eastern Highway (SH-8).

topPlaces.name: Vazhithala
topPlaces.description: Vazhithala is a village in Idukki district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Manakkad
topPlaces.description: Manakkad is a village in Thodupuzha Taluk of Idukki District in Kerala, India, bordering Thodupuzha town on the banks of the Thodupuzha river.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple
topPlaces.description: Sree Rama Swami Temple is an ancient Hindu temple located in Ramapuram village in Meenachil tehsil and near Pala in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is classified one among the 108 Abhimana kshetrams of Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Pampanal Waterfalls
topPlaces.description: Pampanal Waterfalls is located in Kottayam district in Kerala, India. It is located near Manathoor on the Pala-Thodupuzha bypass route, approximately 42 km (26 mi) from Kottayam town and 15 km (9.3 mi) from Thodupuzha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Antony's Church, Kuninji?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Antony's Church, Kuninji is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Antony's Church, Kuninji?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (42 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Antony's Church, Kuninji?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Antony's Church, Kuninji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Antony's Church, Kuninji?
faq.a: Stays in St. Antony's Church, Kuninji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Antony's Church, Kuninji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kuninji, Purapuzha, Karimkunnam, Idukki, Manathoor, Vazhithala.
